label: Lantern Guest Cell
description: Lantern Guest Cell is a narrow sleeping chamber cut into the Pallid Lantern’s ferrocrete gallery wall, its surfaces ribbed with exposed bracing and sealed service seams. A built-in bunk and plasteel locker occupy opposite sides, their edges rounded and bolted in accordance with the enclave’s impact and fire protocols. Hooded lumen slits cast a cold, regulated light that leaves corners in deliberate shadow, while the air carries a constant draft from the tavern’s vent grilles. A thick, gasketed door and an internal vox-call plate emphasize the room’s function as secured lodging under siege discipline.
